privileged_info_summary: The experiment file and conditions file are expected to be created at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sst_task/stop_signal.psyexp and /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sst_task/sst_conditions.csv respectively, as explicitly required by the instructions and verified by the environment scripts. The sound asset is an audio file located at /home/ga/assets/beep.wav, synthetically generated by the setup script if not already present.
